---
title: "structural_analysis_IMPROVED"
output: html_document
---
# libraries
```{r}
library(bio3d)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggnewscale)
library(colorspace)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
library(grid)
library(grDevices)
library(stats)
```

# import cif files, convert to pdb
```{r}
# setup paths
dir <- "/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/structural_analysis"
output_dir <- file.path(dir, "andres_mTRPM8_pdb/focus/contactmaps")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "num_contact"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(file.path(output_dir, "conserved"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# load structures from PDB IDs

pdb_ids <- c("8E4L", "8E4N", "9B6D")

pdb_files <- get.pdb(pdb_ids, path = file.path(dir, "andres_mTRPM8_pdb/focus"), overwrite = FALSE)

andres_mTRPM8_pdb <- lapply(pdb_ids, function(id) {
  read.pdb(file.path(dir, "andres_mTRPM8_pdb/focus", paste0(id, ".pdb")))
})
names(andres_mTRPM8_pdb) <- pdb_ids
cat("Loaded", length(andres_mTRPM8_pdb), "mTRPM8 structures\n")

# verify numbering
for (name in names(andres_mTRPM8_pdb)) {
  ca_sel <- atom.select(andres_mTRPM8_pdb[[name]], "calpha")
  resno_range <- range(andres_mTRPM8_pdb[[name]]$atom$resno[ca_sel$atom])
  n_residues <- length(unique(andres_mTRPM8_pdb[[name]]$atom$resno[ca_sel$atom]))
  chains <- unique(andres_mTRPM8_pdb[[name]]$atom$chain)
  cat(sprintf("  %s: residues %d-%d (total: %d), chains: %s\n", 
              name, resno_range[1], resno_range[2], n_residues, 
              paste(chains, collapse=", ")))
}

```

# contact calculations
```{r}
# contact calculation of ChimeraX from scratch
chimerax_vdw_radii <- list(
  C = 1.70, N = 1.55, O = 1.52, S = 1.80, 
  H = 1.20, P = 1.80, F = 1.47, Cl = 1.75,
  Br = 1.85, I = 1.98, Se = 1.90
)

calc_contacts_chimerax_fast <- function(pdb_obj,
                                        overlap_cutoff = -0.4,
                                        allowance = 0.0,
                                        selection = "sidechain",
                                        resno_range = NULL,
                                        exclude_adjacent = TRUE,
                                        distance_prefilter = 10.0) {

  # select only sidechain atoms within range (all if no range)
  if (!is.null(resno_range)) {
    atom_sel <- atom.select(pdb_obj, selection, resno = resno_range)
  } else {
    atom_sel <- atom.select(pdb_obj, selection)
  }

  # extract atom coordinate matrix, element type, residue number, residue identity, and chain
  xyz     <- pdb_obj$xyz[atom_sel$xyz]
  xyz_mat <- matrix(xyz, ncol = 3, byrow = TRUE)
  elety   <- pdb_obj$atom$elety[atom_sel$atom]
  resno   <- pdb_obj$atom$resno[atom_sel$atom]
  resid   <- pdb_obj$atom$resid[atom_sel$atom]
  chain   <- pdb_obj$atom$chain[atom_sel$atom]

  # assign VDW radius to each atom by element symbol
  atom_vdw <- sapply(substr(elety, 1, 1), function(e) {
    ifelse(e %in% names(chimerax_vdw_radii), chimerax_vdw_radii[[e]], 1.70)
  })

  # pairwise euclidean distance between all atoms
  distance_mat <- as.matrix(dist(xyz_mat, method = "euclidean"))

  # VDW overlap: positive = clash, negative = near-contact
  vdw_sum_mat <- outer(atom_vdw, atom_vdw, "+")
  overlap_mat <- vdw_sum_mat - distance_mat - allowance

  # contact if overlap >= cutoff AND within prefilter distance
  contact_mat      <- (overlap_mat >= overlap_cutoff) & (distance_mat < distance_prefilter) & (overlap_mat <= 0.6)
  diag(contact_mat) <- FALSE

  # unique residue metadata
  unique_resno   <- unique(resno)
  unique_resid   <- resid[match(unique_resno, resno)]
  unique_chains  <- chain[match(unique_resno, resno)]
  n_res          <- length(unique_resno)
  resno_to_idx   <- match(resno, unique_resno)

  # initialize residue-level matrices
  residue_contact_count <- matrix(0,   nrow = n_res, ncol = n_res)
  residue_min_distance <- matrix(Inf, nrow = n_res, ncol = n_res)
  interaction_details <- list()

  for (i in 1:n_res) {
    res_i_atoms <- which(resno_to_idx == i)
    if (length(res_i_atoms) == 0) next

    for (j in i:n_res) {
      res_j_atoms <- which(resno_to_idx == j)
      if (length(res_j_atoms) == 0) next

      # skip sequence-adjacent residues
      if (exclude_adjacent && abs(unique_resno[i] - unique_resno[j]) <= 1) next

      contact_subset <- contact_mat[res_i_atoms, res_j_atoms, drop = FALSE]
      dist_subset    <- distance_mat[res_i_atoms, res_j_atoms, drop = FALSE]
      n_contacts     <- sum(contact_subset)

      if (n_contacts > 0) {
        residue_contact_count[i, j] <- n_contacts
        residue_contact_count[j, i] <- n_contacts

        min_dist <- min(dist_subset)
        residue_min_distance[i, j] <- min_dist
        residue_min_distance[j, i] <- min_dist

        interaction_details[[length(interaction_details) + 1]] <- data.frame(
          res1_num         = unique_resno[i],
          res1_id          = unique_resid[i],
          res2_num         = unique_resno[j],
          res2_id          = unique_resid[j],
          n_atomic_contacts = n_contacts,
          min_distance     = min_dist,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        )
      }
    }
  }

  # binary contact map
  residue_contact_binary <- residue_contact_count > 0
  diag(residue_contact_binary) <- FALSE

  # label rows/cols with chain:residueNUM
  res_labels <- paste0(unique_chains, ":", unique_resid, unique_resno)
  rownames(residue_contact_count)  <- colnames(residue_contact_count)  <- res_labels
  rownames(residue_contact_binary) <- colnames(residue_contact_binary) <- res_labels
  rownames(residue_min_distance)   <- colnames(residue_min_distance)   <- res_labels

  interaction_df <- if (length(interaction_details) > 0) do.call(rbind, interaction_details) else data.frame()

  return(list(
    contact_binary    = residue_contact_binary,
    contact_count     = residue_contact_count,
    min_distance      = residue_min_distance,
    residues          = unique_resno,
    residue_ids       = unique_resid,
    chains            = unique_chains,
    interaction_details = interaction_df,
    parameters        = list(
      overlap_cutoff = overlap_cutoff,
      allowance      = allowance,
      selection      = selection,
      method         = "ChimeraX-like VDW overlap"
    )
  ))
}

# region-specific (faster due to fewer atoms)
andres_contacts_region <- lapply(names(andres_mTRPM8_pdb), function(name) {
  cat("Processing", name, "...\n")
  calc_contacts_chimerax_fast(andres_mTRPM8_pdb[[name]],
                               overlap_cutoff = -0.4,
                               selection = "sidechain",
                               resno_range = 807:1050)
})
names(andres_contacts_region) <- names(andres_mTRPM8_pdb)
```

# my cm overlaid
```{r}
calc_combined_df <- bind_rows(
  lapply(names(andres_contacts_region), function(i) {
    print(i)
    andres_contacts_region[[i]]$interaction_details %>%
      mutate(
        structure = case_when(
          i == "8E4L" ~ "O",
          i == "8E4N" ~ "C1",
          i == "9B6D" ~ "D"
        ),
        # mirror contacts
        resnum1 = res1_num,
        resnum2 = res2_num
      ) %>%
      bind_rows(
        mutate(., resnum1 = res2_num, resnum2 = res1_num)
      )
  })
)

calc_combined_df <- calc_combined_df %>%
  filter(
    resnum1 >= 807, resnum1 <= 1050,
    resnum2 >= 807, resnum2 <= 1050
  ) %>%
  group_by(resnum1, resnum2) %>%
  mutate(structures_present = paste(sort(unique(structure)), collapse = " & "),
         contact_method = paste("CalcContact")) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(structures_present = case_when(structures_present == "O" ~ "Open (O)",
                   structures_present == "C1" ~ "Closed (C1)",
                   structures_present == "D" ~ "Desensitized (D)",
                   TRUE ~ structures_present))

calc_combined_df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = resnum1, y = resnum2, color = structures_present)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, shape = 15) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
    "Open (O)"                         = "#92cf60",
    "Closed (C1)"                       = "#e9a3c9",
    "Desensitized (D)"                 = "gold",
    "C1 & O"                = "#fc8e59",
    "D & O"          = "#998ec3",
    "C1 & D"        = "#92bfdb",
    "C1 & D & O" = "black"),
    breaks = c("Open (O)", "Closed (C1)", "Desensitized (D)",
             "C1 & O", "D & O",
             "C1 & D",
             "C1 & D & O"),
    name = "Conformation") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.2, xlim = c(951, 974), ylim = c(820, 945)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(951, 974, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(820, 945, by = 10)) +
  labs(x = "Residue", y = "Residue", title = "Contact Maps (Calculated Contacts)") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 10),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
    legend.position = "right"
  )
```
# compare contact methods
```{r}
# import scores
cold_scores_df <- read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/li_obj/combined_score/cold/combined_scores.csv")
menthol_scores_df <- read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/li_obj/combined_score/menthol/combined_scores.csv")
rt_scores_df <- read.csv("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/lilace/finalout/li_obj/combined_score/rt/combined_scores.csv")

combined_scores_df <- bind_rows(cold_scores_df, menthol_scores_df)

cold_scores_line_df <- cold_scores_df %>% 
  filter(position != 0) %>% 
  select(position, effect, effect_se) %>% 
  group_by(position) %>% 
  mutate(effect_sd = sd(effect),
         effect_se = effect_sd/sqrt(n())) %>% 
  summarise(effect = median(effect),
    effect_sd_median = median(effect_sd),
    effect_se_median = median(effect_se)
  ) %>% 
  rename(effect_median = effect) %>% 
  mutate(Condition = paste("Cold"))

menthol_scores_line_df <- menthol_scores_df %>% 
  filter(position != 0) %>% 
  select(position, effect, effect_se) %>% 
  group_by(position) %>% 
  mutate(effect_sd = sd(effect),
         effect_se = effect_sd/sqrt(n())) %>% 
  summarise(effect = median(effect),
    effect_sd_median = median(effect_sd),
    effect_se_median = median(effect_se)
  ) %>% 
  rename(effect_median = effect) %>%  
  mutate(Condition = paste("Menthol"))

scores_line_df <- bind_rows(cold_scores_line_df, menthol_scores_line_df)

scores_line <- ggplot(scores_line_df, aes(x = position, y = effect_median, 
                            color = Condition, fill = Condition)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = effect_median - effect_se,
                  ymax = effect_median + effect_se),
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
  geom_line() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Cold" = "blue", "Menthol" = "green")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cold" = "blue", "Menthol" = "green")) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Position", y = "Scores") +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 10, xlim = c(950, 975), ylim = c(-2, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(950, 975, by = 5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(-2, 0, by = 0.5), position = "right")
```

# combined cm
```{r}
y_min <- 820; y_max <- 960
e_min <- -2;  e_max <- 0

rescale_effect  <- function(x) (x - e_min) / (e_max - e_min) * (y_max - y_min) + y_min
rescale_inverse <- function(x) (x - y_min) / (y_max - y_min) * (e_max - e_min) + e_min

calc_combined_combined_df <- calc_combined_df %>% 
  mutate(contact_type = paste("side-side")) %>% 
  select(resnum1, resnum2, structure, contact_type, structures_present, contact_method)

cm_fillcolors <- c(
    "Open (O)"                         = "#92cf60",
    "Closed (C1)"                       = "#e9a3c9",
    "Desensitized (D)"                 = "gold",
    "C1 & O"                = "#fc8e59",
    "D & O"          = "#998ec3",
    "C1 & D"        = "#92bfdb",
    "C1 & D & O" = "black")

cm_strokecolors <- darken(cm_fillcolors, amount = 0.2)
calc_combined_combined_df$structures_present <- factor(calc_combined_combined_df$structures_present, levels = names(cm_fillcolors))
cm_fillcolors <- cm_fillcolors[levels(calc_combined_combined_df$structures_present)]
cm_strokecolors <- cm_strokecolors[levels(calc_combined_combined_df$structures_present)]

m_combined_plot <- calc_combined_combined_df %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x = resnum1, y = resnum2)) +
  geom_ribbon(data = scores_line_df,
              aes(x = position,
                  y = rescale_effect(effect_median),
                  ymin = rescale_effect(pmax(effect_median - effect_se_median, e_min)),
                  ymax = rescale_effect(pmin(effect_median + effect_se_median, e_max)),
                  fill = Condition),
              alpha = 0.2, color = NA, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  geom_line(data = scores_line_df,
            aes(x = position, y = rescale_effect(effect_median), color = Condition),
            inherit.aes = FALSE, alpha = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Cold" = "#0032cc", "Menthol" = "#006600"),
                     name = "Condition Score") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Cold" = "#0032cc", "Menthol" = "#006600"),
                    name = "Condition Score") +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "", breaks = seq(951, 974, by = 5), limits = c(951, 974)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Sequence position",
    limits = c(y_min, 945),
    breaks = seq(y_min, 945, by = 20),
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ rescale_inverse(.),
                        name = "Scores",
                        breaks = seq(e_min, e_max, by = 0.5))
  ) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 0.2) +
  theme_classic(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 8),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 8),
    legend.position = "right",
    axis.title.y.right = element_text(angle = 90),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 8),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.4, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.y = unit(0.1, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1),
    fill  = guide_legend(order = 2)
  )+
  new_scale_color() +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_point(aes(fill = structures_present, color = structures_present),
             size = 2.5, stroke = .8, shape = 22) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cm_fillcolors,
                    breaks = c("Open (O)", "Closed (C1)", "Desensitized (D)",
             "C1 & O", "D & O",
             "C1 & D",
             "C1 & D & O"),
             name = "Conformation")+
  scale_color_manual(values = cm_strokecolors,
  breaks = c("Open (O)", "Closed (C1)", "Desensitized (D)",
             "C1 & O", "D & O",
             "C1 & D",
             "C1 & D & O"),
  name = "Conformation")

ggsave("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/structural_analysis/andres_mTRPM8_pdb/focus/cm_combined.pdf", width=17.8, height=22.5, units="cm", dpi=320, device = cairo_pdf)
```

# count per position histogram
```{r}
calccontactsOnly_countmatrix_list <- list()

for (i in names(andres_contacts_region)) {
calccontactsOnly_countmatrix <- as.data.frame(andres_contacts_region[[i]][["interaction_details"]]) %>% 
  rownames_to_column(var="temp") %>% select(-temp) %>% 
  rename(resnum1 = res1_num, resnum2 = res2_num, resname1 = res1_id, resname2 = res2_id, contacts = n_atomic_contacts) %>% 
  select(resnum1, resnum2, contacts) %>% 
  complete(resnum1 = 807:1050, resnum2 = 807:1050, fill = list(contacts = 0)) %>% 
  mutate(resnum1 = as.numeric(resnum1), resnum2 = as.numeric(resnum2), contacts = as.numeric(contacts)) %>% 
  filter(between(resnum1, 820, 945) & between(resnum2, 951, 974)) %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = resnum2, values_from = contacts, values_fill = 0) %>% 
  column_to_rownames(var="resnum1") %>% 
  summarise(across(everything(), sum)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(everything(), names_to = "position", values_to = "contacts") %>% 
  mutate(position = as.numeric(position),
         contacts = as.numeric(contacts),
         method = "Custom", conformation = 
           case_when(grepl("8E4L", i) ~ "O",
                     grepl("8E4N", i) ~ "C1",
                     grepl("9B6D", i) ~ "D"))
calccontactsOnly_countmatrix_list[[substr(i, 1, 4)]] <- calccontactsOnly_countmatrix
}

calccontactsOnly_countmatrix_combined <- bind_rows(calccontactsOnly_countmatrix_list) %>% select(-method)

test <- calccontactsOnly_countmatrix_combined %>% 
  pivot_wider(names_from = conformation, values_from = contacts) %>% 
  filter(between(as.numeric(position), 951, 974)) %>% 
  column_to_rownames(var="position") %>%
  t()

group_colors_hm <- c(
    "O"                         = "#92cf60",
    "C1"                       = "#e9a3c9",
    "D"                 = "gold")

ht_list <- NULL
for (i in rownames(test)) {
  row_mat <- matrix(test[i, ], nrow = 1)
  rownames(row_mat) <- i
  
  ht_list <- ht_list %v%
    Heatmap(
      row_mat,
      name = i,
      cluster_rows = FALSE,
      cluster_columns = FALSE,
      col = colorRamp2(
        seq(0, 99, length.out = 100),
        colorRampPalette(c("white", group_colors_hm[i]))(100)
      ),
      column_title = NULL,
      show_column_names = TRUE,
      row_names_side = "left",
      width = unit(ncol(row_mat) * 5, "mm"),
      height = unit(10, "mm"),
      row_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial"),
      column_names_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial"),
      heatmap_legend_param = list(
        at = c(0, 25, 50, 75, 100),       # legend tick marks
        labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial"),
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial")
      )
    )
}

cairo_pdf("/stor/work/Jara/threedim_bins/structural_analysis/andres_mTRPM8_pdb/focus/contact_heatmap.pdf",
          width = 17.8/2.54, height = 5/2.54)
draw(ht_list,
     heatmap_legend_side = "right",
     annotation_legend_side = "right",
     legend_labels_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial"),
     legend_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial"))
dev.off()
```
